titles.text: Super Metroid But I Hate You

descriptions.text: A troll hack of Super Metroid made for a friend that pokes fun at Super Metroid hacking as a whole, featuring many references to obscure and highly-specific things, intentionally poorly designed rooms, baffling design choices, and an utterly psychotic amount of custom assembly to create an utterly unhinged and bizarre playthrough of Super Metroid.
